flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at University of Southern California rose 28% between 2007 and 2010 ($14.5k → $18.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Southern California rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($61.5k → $72.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Southern California rose 15% between 2007 and 2010 ($35.8k → $41.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Southern California fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).
